function solve(s: string): string[] {
    const segments: string[] = [];
    const seen = new Set<string>();
    let start = 0;
    while (start < s.length) {
        let current = '';
        let end = start;
        while (end < s.length) {
            current += s[end];
            if (!seen.has(current)) {
                seen.add(current);
                segments.push(current);
                start = end + 1;
                break;
            } else {
                end++;
            }
        }
    }
    return segments;
}
